subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Proposed action violates three critical policies: (1) POL-601 requires mandatory 48-hour staging validation before production rollout; (2) POL-602 requires change board approval and monitoring setup which have not been obtained; (3) POL-603 requires automated rollback capability and traffic monitoring configuration as prerequisites. Direct production rollout without staging validation is not permitted.
required_actions: Submit change request to change board for approval
Deploy Docker image changes to staging environment
Configure automated rollback mechanism for production
Establish traffic monitoring and alerting for rollout
Document rollout strategy and monitoring plan
Obtain change board approval before production deployment
